en: And God blessed Noah and his sons and said to them, "Be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth.
zh: 神賜福給挪亞和他的兒子，對他們說：“你們要繁衍增多，充滿大地。

en: The fear of you and the dread of you shall be upon every beast of the earth and upon every bird of the heavens, upon everything that creeps on the ground and all the fish of the sea. Into your hand they are delivered.
zh: 地上各樣的走獸，空中各樣的飛鳥，甚至地上各樣爬行的動物，和海裡各樣的魚類，都要對你們驚恐懼怕；這一切都已經交在你們手裡了。

en: Every moving thing that lives shall be food for you. And as I gave you the green plants, I give you everything.
zh: 所有活著的動物都可以作你們的食物，我把這一切都賜給你們，好像我把青菜賜給了你們一樣。

en: But you shall not eat flesh with its life, that is, its blood.
zh: 唯獨帶著生命的肉，就是帶著血的肉，你們卻不可吃。

en: And for your lifeblood I will require a reckoning: from every beast I will require it and from man. From his fellow man I will require a reckoning for the life of man.
zh: 流你們的血、害你們生命的，我必向他們追償；無論是走獸或人類，甚至各人自己的兄弟，我必要他償命。

en: "Whoever sheds the blood of man, by man shall his blood be shed, for God made man in his own image.
zh: 流人血的， 人也必流他的血； 因為 神造人， 是按著他自己的形象。

en: And you, be fruitful and multiply, teem on the earth and multiply in it."
zh: 你們要繁衍增多； 要在地上滋生、增多。”

en: Then God said to Noah and to his sons with him,
zh: 神告訴挪亞和與他在一起的兒子說：

en: "Behold, I establish my covenant with you and your offspring after you,
zh: “看哪，我現在與你們和你們的後裔立約，

en: and with every living creature that is with you, the birds, the livestock, and every beast of the earth with you, as many as came out of the ark; it is for every beast of the earth.
zh: 並且與所有跟你們在一起有生命的活物立約，包括飛鳥、牲畜和所有地上的走獸，就是與從方舟裡出來的立約。

en: I establish my covenant with you, that never again shall all flesh be cut off by the waters of the flood, and never again shall there be a flood to destroy the earth."
zh: 我要與你們立約：凡有生命的必不再被洪水除滅，再沒有洪水來毀滅大地了。”

en: And God said, "This is the sign of the covenant that I make between me and you and every living creature that is with you, for all future generations:
zh: 神說：“這就是我與你們，與一切跟你們同在有生命的活物所立之約的記號，直到萬代；

en: I have set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be a sign of the covenant between me and the earth.
zh: 我把彩虹放在雲彩中，作我與大地立約的記號。

en: When I bring clouds over the earth and the bow is seen in the clouds,
zh: 我使雲彩遮蓋大地時，彩虹出現雲彩中，

en: I will remember my covenant that is between me and you and every living creature of all flesh. And the waters shall never again become a flood to destroy all flesh.
zh: 我就記念我與你們和一切有生命的活物所立的約： 水不再成為洪水， 來毀滅凡有生命的。

en: When the bow is in the clouds, I will see it and remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is on the earth."
zh: 彩虹在雲彩中出現， 我看見了就記念 我與地上一切有生命的活物，所立的永約。”

en: God said to Noah, "This is the sign of the covenant that I have established between me and all flesh that is on the earth."
zh: 神對挪亞說：“這就是我與地上凡有生命的立約的記號。”

en: The sons of Noah who went forth from the ark were Shem, Ham, and Japheth. (Ham was the father of Canaan.)
zh: 挪亞的兒子，從方舟裡出來的，就是閃、含、雅弗；含是迦南的父親。

en: These three were the sons of Noah, and from these the people of the whole earth were dispersed.
zh: 這三個人是挪亞的兒子，全地的人都是從這些人播散開來的。

en: Noah began to be a man of the soil, and he planted a vineyard.
zh: 挪亞作起農夫來，栽種葡萄園。

en: He drank of the wine and became drunk and lay uncovered in his tent.
zh: 他喝酒，喝醉了，就在帳棚裡光著身子。

en: And Ham, the father of Canaan, saw the nakedness of his father and told his two brothers outside.
zh: 迦南的父親含看見了自己父親的下體，就去告訴在外面的兩個兄弟。

en: Then Shem and Japheth took a garment, laid it on both their shoulders, and walked backward and covered the nakedness of their father. Their faces were turned backward, and they did not see their father's nakedness.
zh: 於是，閃和雅弗二人拿了件外衣，搭在自己的肩膀上，倒退著進去，蓋上他們父親的下體；因為他們背著臉，所以沒有看見他們父親的下體。

en: When Noah awoke from his wine and knew what his youngest son had done to him,
zh: 挪亞酒醒以後，知道小兒子對他所作的事，

en: he said, "Cursed be Canaan; a servant of servants shall he be to his brothers."
zh: 就說： “迦南應當受咒詛， 他必給自己的兄弟， 作奴僕的奴僕。”

en: He also said, "Blessed be the LORD, the God of Shem; and let Canaan be his servant.
zh: 又說： “耶和華，閃的 神， 是應當稱頌的；願迦南作他的奴僕。

en: May God enlarge Japheth, and let him dwell in the tents of Shem, and let Canaan be his servant."
zh: 願 神使雅弗擴展， 使雅弗住在閃的帳棚裡； 願迦南作他的奴僕。”

en: After the flood Noah lived 350 years.
zh: 洪水以後，挪亞又活了三百 五十年。

en: All the days of Noah were 950 years, and he died.
zh: 挪亞共活了九百五十歲，就死了。
